zh.of Worleston, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾沃萊斯頓
zh.Worleston, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭爾沃萊斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Chetwode於1473年出生在英國爾沃萊斯頓時，他的父親Roger Chetwode33歲，母親Ellen De Ree30歲。他於大約1499年與Cicely Ellen Beresford在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1531年在英國英格蘭爾沃萊斯頓享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Chetwode于1473年出生在英国爾沃萊斯頓时，他的父亲Roger Chetwode33岁，母亲Ellen De Ree30岁。他于大约1499年与Cicely Ellen Beresford在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1531年在英国英格兰爾沃萊斯頓享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Chetwode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Chetwood
meanings: English: habitational name from Chetwode in Buckinghamshire or from Cheetwood in Cheetham, Manchester (Lancashire). This placename consists of the Brittonic placename element cēto- ‘wood’, with an explanatory addition in Old English of wudu ‘wood’. The surname may also be a Shropshire variant of Chatwin .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Chetwode was born in 1473, in Worleston, Cheshire, England, his father, Roger Chetwode, was 33 and his mother, Ellen De Ree, was 30. He married Cicely Ellen Beresford about 1499, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1531, in Worleston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Chetwode est né en 1473, à Worleston, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Chetwode, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Ellen De Ree, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Cicely Ellen Beresford environ 1499, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1531, à Worleston, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Chetwode 1473 in Worleston, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Chetwode 33 und seine Mutter Ellen De Ree 30. Er hat um 1499 in Staffordshire, England Cicely Ellen Beresford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1531 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Worleston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Chetwode è nato il nel 1473 nel Worleston, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Roger Chetwode, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Ellen De Ree, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Cicely Ellen Beresford circa 1499, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1531, nel Worleston, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Chetwodeが1473年にイギリスチェシュアイアウオルレストンで生まれた時，父Roger Chetwodeは33歳，母Ellen De Reeは30歳であった。約1499年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでCicely Ellen Beresfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1531年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウオルレストンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Chetwode(이)가 1473년 영국 체실르 워레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Chetwode(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen De Ree(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1499년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Cicely Ellen Beresford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1531년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워레스턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Chetwode nasceu em 1473, em Worleston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Chetwode, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Ellen De Ree, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Cicely Ellen Beresford aproximadamente 1499, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1531, em Worleston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Chetwode родился в 1473 г. в местности ворльстон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Chetwode было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen De Ree, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Cicely Ellen Beresford около 1499 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1531 г. в местности ворльстон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Chetwode nació en 1473, en Worleston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Chetwode, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Ellen De Ree, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Cicely Ellen Beresford aproximadamente 1499, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1531, en Worleston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
